items.title: For the Sin City Celtics, giving up on a hand because they didn't like the cards they got dealt isn't an option.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
For the Sin City Celtics, giving up on a hand because they didn't like the cards they got dealt isn't an option.

As both sides fight for their dreams, Amile Jefferson's outpouring of energy and coaching through the final whistle, embodied that today.

items.title: "Make our habits stronger than being tired."
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
"Make our habits stronger than being tired."

Like the Celtics' Summer League roster, Amile Jefferson is fighting for his dream.

While it came in a loss, Monday's fight through fatigue-induced adversity captured that neither side will shortchange the other. hardwoodhoudini.com/celtics-cult...

media.title: Celtics' culture on display in Summer League loss: 'Stronger than being tired'
media.description: Amile Jefferson and the Summer League Celtics are fighting for their NBA dreams. Monday's loss proved that no matter what, this group won't shortchange itself.

items.title: It was a tough showing for the Celtics, playing in their third game in four days and on the second half of a b2b. However, they competed until the end.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
It was a tough showing for the Celtics, playing in their third game in four days and on the second half of a b2b. However, they competed until the end.

I asked Amile Jefferson about the group’s competitive character.

“Sometimes things don't go your way…Can you lean in…on your habits?”
